articles.title_en: ‘He thought Ukraine was going to lose’: French President Macron says Trump changed his view on Russia’s war in Ukraine
articles.lead_en: French President Emmanuel Macron said Donald Trump believed Ukraine would lose the war with Russia when he returned to the White House in early 2025 — but has since changed his assessment.

articles.title_en: Penza Authorities Forcibly Mobilizing Men Into Military – Reports
articles.lead_en: An NGO that helps Russian men avoid military service said it was contacted by several people in the city of Penza and nearby towns who described men being “rounded up indiscriminately.”
